name: Poached Halibut Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chicken broth or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe each fillet with a paper towel and cut it in half lengthwise.
2. Roll up each piece of halibut.
3. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a microwave-safe pie plate at high power for 1 minute.
4. Add the chicken broth or white wine, minced garlic, tarragon or basil, Dijon mustard, chopped tomatoes, sugar, and paprika to the melted butter.
5. Cover and cook for 5 minutes at high power, stirring well.
6. Place the fish rolls side by side in the dish and baste with the sauce.
7. Cook for an additional 8 minutes at medium-high power, basting halfway through the cooking time.
8. Remove the fish using a perforated spoon and place it in a warm dish.
9. To the remaining sauce in the cooking dish, add the heavy cream and paprika; stir once.
10. Continue cooking for 4 minutes at high power. Pour the sauce over the fish and serve.
